feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can't find documentation for .sap Shortcut files
entry.content:
Hi Team,

in projects we are using *.sap shortcut files and they work fine.

Now we need a shortcut file which should use our snc configuration and automatically open the SAP system.

Unfortunately I can't find any documentation for the parameters espaecially the SNC parameters for *.sap file.

See a example of one of our  shortcut files attached.

Is there a documentation available or can you give me the snc parameters?

Many thanks in advance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: What kinds of instances are there in SAP R/3?
entry.content:
i want to understand finally what are all the passible instances types, and what each instances include.
thank you 🙂

entry.title: Question:Whether the NetWeaver SDK can be used with S/4HANA 2025 and its support expiration date
entry.content:
Is it possible to communicate with SAP S/4HANA 2025 (on-premises/private cloud) using the NetWeaver RFC SDK?

Additionally, while the end of support for the NetWeaver RFC SDK has been announced for the end of 2027, is there a successor product available after this date?

entry.title: Does support for Exadata Cloud Service include multi-cloud deployments (AWS, Azure, GCP)?
entry.content: Note 2614028 - "SAP NetWeaver with Oracle Database Exadata Cloud Service" describes the products that are supported with Exadata Cloud Service. However, does not go into detail on if this is applicable when deployed in mutli-cloud environments (at AWS, GCP, Azure) in addition to OCI.  Are these environments supported if, for example, a customer deploys the database using Exadata Cloud Service at AWS with NetWeaver deployed on EC2 connecting to it? Same question for ECC,

entry.title: Housekeeping of RSMONMESS table in BW Production P19
entry.content:
We have observed that the system table RSMONMESS is growing rapidly in the BW Production (P19) system. The current record count is greater than 1.5 billion, which is quite large.

 

We would like to perform housekeeping on this table to reduce its size without impacting any other objects or system functionality.

Could you please suggest the recommended approach or best practices to safely perform this cleanup.

entry.title: RSPM_HOUSKEEPING not working for LNPPTRIO
entry.content:
Hi team,

We have one ADSO LNPPTRIO , in which RSPM_HOSEKEEPING is not working.
After checking the requests we found some request from 1972 which are not activated.

Can you please provide solution to reduce the number of requests.

entry.title: The BDLS table process was automatically for table /BIC/AZ**00
entry.content:
During the execution of the BDLS (Logical System Name Conversion), the process was canceled while processing table /BIC/AZ**00. The cancellation occurred without manual intervention and interrupted the overall BDLS activity.

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Upgrade
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Other



Manually selected component: PERSON_NAME-LM-UPG-SAP


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start
entry.content: Our current landscape consists of SAP ECC (ECD) as the backend and SAP NetWeaver Gateway (FPD) for Fiori applications. We would like guidance on implementing SAP Mobile Start so that users can access the Fiori apps on mobile devices.

entry.title: deleting old records from RFCSYSACL table
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to delete old records from RFCSYSACL table, however no system for the old records in table RFCSYSACL in STM1tcode.

should I delete manually? or is there any program for this cleanup?

Regards

entry.title: Issue While Editing Custom Structure – Error in SAP Dictionary (SE11)
entry.content:
When trying to change or edit the custom structure ZMDI01_01 in SE11, the system throws an error message and prevents further editing.

The structure opens in Display mode, but upon attempting to edit or change attributes/components, the following error message is displayed:

“You cannot edit object R3TR TABL ZMDI01_01 with the standard editor.Choose ‘Display object’ or ‘Cancel’.”

Due to this error, changes to the structure cannot be performed.

STRCUTURE NAMES ARE

ZMDI01_01

 ZVEXO07_01

ZVDB00_NALI

entry.title: All thw DTPs are in inactive state post SPS upgrade
entry.content:
We recently completed the Support Package (SP) upgrade in our DEV4 system. Following the completion of the upgrade, we observed that all Data Transfer Processes (DTPs) are currently in an INACTIVE status. As per the feedback received from the BW team, these DTPs are presently being activated manually, one by one.

We would appreciate your guidance on the reason for the DTPs becoming inactive after the SP upgrade and on the recommended approach to activate them automatically or in bulk, instead of performing individual activations.

Your support on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Add New Fields in My Inbox for SAP Flexible Workflow
entry.content:
Good evening,
we have configured the standard scenario of the Flexible Workflow WS00800251 (Supplier Invoices (Blocked).
The approval task displayed in the My Inbox contains only some information.The business requires the possibility to add additional fields in order to display further data. Is it possible to add new fields in this section?

entry.title: Spinning wheel in BW enterprise portal when using edge
entry.content:
Hello!

I have one user that gets the spinning wheel when running BEX/WAD queries in Enterprise portal.

Query loads but when she tries to filter or anything else the spinning wheel comes up and never disappears!

It is working in Chrome but not in Edge for her!

It is working for all others in edge so for me it must be a setting in edge that is missing!

Can you please advice what it could be?

entry.title: Support Pack 35 release query for SAP NetWeaver 7.5 Java system
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

Hope you're well

We are currently on SAP NetWeaver 7.5 SP33 (SAP BOBJ Portal – Java system) and are planning to upgrade to SP34. Could you please confirm if there is any planned release timeline for SP35? Additionally, we would like to understand whether it is recommended to proceed with SP34 or wait for the next support pack.

Thanks & Regards ,

Anitha

entry.title: SAPSR3./BI0/SAC_DOC_NO partition issue
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Our BW * system is currently generating alerts indicating that the table SAPSR3./BI0/SAC_*** (partition 0) contains 1,9*** records, which is causing performance concerns.

We kindly request you to provide the appropriate online partitioning command that can be executed without downtime.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BW SP Latest availability
entry.content:
Hello There,

We would like to know which latest SAP BW SP available? As we have currently SAP NetWeaver 7.5 SP 28 installed. We see latest is SP34 in the below URL.
 SAP Product Availability Matrix 
May we know when SP36 will be releases?

entry.title: How to determine whether the DTP has filter or not.
entry.content:
We would like to confirm that whether DTP has filters or not. And if possible, what characteristics are filters and what kind of filter they are (fix value or variable).  

I tried to looking for the metadata of the DTP, but it seems to be not to be defined in the DTP's metadata.

entry.title: Need to understand impact of Archiving Customers and Business Partners from ECC syetem on BW system
entry.content: We have customers and Business Partners having a specific Account Group which will be archived from ECC.  I need to understand how this will impact BW master data. BW already has 164914 customers which will be archived from ECC.

entry.title: Best solutions/suggestions to bring SAP Datasphere data to SAP BW 7.5 on Oracle system
entry.content:
Dear SAP Colleagues & Experts

We are looking for best approach/suggestion to bring SAP Datasphere data to SAP BW 7.5 on Oracle system.

  1. DB connect can help to bring the data from Datasphere (Source) to SAP BW (Target)? If possible, in that case what are the per-requisite
  2. SAP Datasphere can place data to SAP BW 7.5 on Oracle file server path, further to create a datamodel 

Best regards,

Venkata

entry.title: Table in BW Web template is shrinking if data is blank
entry.content: We have a 4 Week report (Web Template) where we are having 2 tables in the report, the first table will have the data for all categories by week wise and the other table will have the data at day level for the last week. If there is no data in the 4 week table, the column in the day wise table will shrink and the formatting is wrong., due to this the data is not showing correctly in the report and misleading the data in the report
